/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/neon_demo.dir/array_processing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neon_demo.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neon_demo.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neon_demo.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neon_demo.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neon_demo.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neon_demo.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neon_demo.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o -o neon_demo  third_party/glfw/src/libglfw3.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework QuartzCore -framework CoreFoundation
